changelog: Update packages are now built in a legacy-compatible layout so older installations correctly detect the application payload
The updater now prefers the root version.json over payload version files, preventing package-root detection errors
Update checks now compare both foxdesk.org and GitHub so a stale primary endpoint cannot hide a newer release
Private ticket attachments are now blocked from direct uploads/storage access and protected when served through image.php
Email notifications now convert rich text comments into readable plain text instead of showing raw HTML tags
Ticket quick-edit APIs now validate assignees, companies, priorities, statuses, ticket types, and on-behalf users before saving
Ticket edit permissions, tag updates, and status changes now consistently respect the user's ticket visibility scope
Report builder now pre-fills settings from the last report created for the selected company
The admin time report custom date range picker now appears correctly after selecting Custom range
Dashboard ticket counts and links now use the same visibility rules as the tickets list
Changing a ticket company now refreshes related billable rates for time entries
